notes: HAR-234 executable parity replay for local fulfillment-order lifecycle staging. The runner seeds the captured Shopify 2026-04 order/fulfillment-order preconditions, replays supported hold/release, move, report-progress/open, and cancel mutations against the local proxy harness, and compares captured Shopify payload slices to proxy payload slices directly. Target-local expected differences are limited to synthetic IDs and timestamps for locally created staged records. Reroute remains documented as a captured Shopify internal-error branch rather than local support.
